recommendations.title: Collision
recommendations.overview: Deceit and betrayal rise to the surface after newlyweds survive a deadly car accident in the Moroccan desert.

recommendations.title: Black Moon Rising
recommendations.overview: An FBI free-lancer stashes a stolen Las Vegas-crime tape in a high-tech car stolen by someone else.

recommendations.title: Aftermath
recommendations.overview: When the others leave for the night, the last mortician begins to fondle the corpses. He quickly moves to the corpse of a young woman who died in a car crash.

recommendations.title: Eden
recommendations.overview: After a night out with friends, Hyun Jae accepts a late night ride home from a young fire fighter. What begins as a night of promise quickly turns into a nightmare when she is abducted and imprisoned outside Las Vegas as a sex slave.

recommendations.title: Joy Ride 2: Dead Ahead
recommendations.overview: While driving to Las Vegas for the bachelor party of her sister Melissa and her fiance Bobby, Kayla stops the car at a gas station to meet her date, Nik, a guy she met on the internet. Nik convinces her to take a secondary road under the protest of B

recommendations.title: The Godfather Part II
recommendations.overview: In the continuing saga of the Corleone crime family, a young Vito Corleone grows up in Sicily and in 1910s New York. In the 1950s, Michael Corleone attempts to expand the family business into Las Vegas, Hollywood and Cuba.

recommendations.title: Ocean's Eleven
recommendations.overview: Danny Ocean and his gang attempt to rob the five biggest casinos in Las Vegas in one night.

recommendations.title: After.Life
recommendations.overview: Following a terrible car crash, a woman awakes to find an enigmatic mortician preparing her for burial.

recommendations.title: Elevator
recommendations.overview: Nine people are stuck in an elevator. One of them has a ticking bomb that can't be defused. The other eight will do anything to survive. There is no escape and no promise of rescue. As the tension in the elevator mounts the unthinkable soon becomes t

recommendations.title: Vegas Vacation
recommendations.overview: The Griswold family hits the road again for a typically ill-fated vacation, this time to the glitzy mecca of slots and showgirls—Las Vegas.
